title: Carmen Noir Lightweight Travel Hair Dryer with Concentrator Nozzle and Foldable Handle, Travel Bag, Luxury Soft Touch Finish 1200W, Black and Copper C80020COP
features: POWERFUL 1200W OUTPUT: Powerful airflow dries hair quickly, leaving you with a professional, bouncing blow dry without salon prices
TWO HEAT AND TWO SPEED SETTINGS: Variable heat and speed settings capable of drying hair of all types with a smooth, glossy finish
FOLDING HANDLE: Travel-friendly design comes with a folding handle to reduce the dryer’s size, allowing it to fit perfectly in your handbag or luggage case
PROFESSIONAL FINISH: Concentrator nozzle included for styling sectioned hair to create defined volume and texture
3 YEAR GUARANTEE: Professional Carmen quality with a standard 1-year manufacturer’s guarantee and a 2-year extension, subject to product registration online
description: Get professional blow-dry results wherever you go with the Noir Travel Hair Dryer from Carmen. Its powerful motor provides fast, frizz-free styling with 2 speed and heat settings to customise the drying intensity to suit your hair type. The concentrator nozzle accessory is for creating the precise look you want and lifting your hair’s natural volume. Specially-designed to travel with you, the dryer comes with a folding handle to keep its size compact and take up less space in your luggage. An included travel bag provides soft cushioning to protect the travel dryer in transport. Its extra-long 1.6m cable lets you style without restriction, complete with integrated hanging loop for convenient storage. Sleek and stylish in looks, the Noir travel dryer is finished in a modern rose gold with black highlights.
